calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Clifford Y. Wang, Esq. appeared with petitioner Wan Chang Zhao, who was present on behalf of herself, and as Guardian ad litem for minor, Hui Yi Li.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Clifford Y. Wang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Tiffany WanChang Li.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor: Karina Li.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
